content: Standard 2025/2026 pattern for user-uploaded product photos: compress/resize client-side in a Web Worker before upload (library: browser-image-compression v2.0.2) targeting maxSizeMB ~1 and maxWidthOrHeight ~1600-1920px, converting to WebP/JPEG as needed. This reduces upload time and failure rate on weak mobile networks and avoids relying on paid server-side transform features. Supabase Storage's built-in image transformation/Smart CDN is NOT included in the free tier (100 free origin images then /1000, full access requires Pro at /mo) so it should not be assumed available for an MVP. next/image still provides responsive srcset/format negotiation (AVIF/WebP) on display side for any remote URL via remotePatterns, independent of Supabase's paid transform feature.
